payload.message: RISK OF RAIN FOR F1 THIRD PRACTICE SESSION IS 0%
LIGHT BLUE HEAD PADDING MATERIAL MUST BE USED
PIT LANE INCIDENT INVOLVING CAR 81 (PIA) NOTED - FAILING TO FOLLOW RACE DIRECTORS INSTRUCTIONS
PIT LANE INCIDENT INVOLVING CAR 1 (VER) NOTED - FAILING TO FOLLOW RACE DIRECTORS INSTRUCTIONS
FIA STEWARDS: PIT LANE INCIDENT INVOLVING CAR 81 (PIA) WILL BE INVESTIGATED AFTER THE SESSION - FAILING TO FOLLOW RACE DIRECTORS INSTRUCTIONS
FIA STEWARDS: PIT LANE INCIDENT INVOLVING CAR 1 (VER) WILL BE INVESTIGATED AFTER THE SESSION - FAILING TO FOLLOW RACE DIRECTORS INSTRUCTIONS
